name_en: Burberry New Arrival Heritage-inspired Zip Tote, crafted from selected canvas with quilted leather trim, featuring the brand's Horseferry print on the front pocket. Can be carried by the reinforced top handle or with a removable shoulder strap. Small: 29.5 x 12 x 31cm
